title: 083e / DPRK / haircut in a cooperative state farm - Wonsan
description: After several unsuccessful attempts to get a haircut in Pyongyang and other cities, I unexpectedly got one at a Model-Cooperative state farm in the Wonsan area on the East Coast of North Korea. My guide Tong Hui was elated when she got the go-ahead! from the woman superviser in charge at the Cooperative farm and even made some photos herself. Indeed she surprised me with an offer to get my hair cut in a very special place! Yes by all means, I had not expected that!
